title: scutellaria galericulata subsp. minor
intro: Scutellaria galericulata subsp. minor, commonly known as lesser skullcap, is a subspecies of the Scutellaria galericulata plant, which belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to Asia and North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of lesser skullcap include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
